race.comment: DOMINATUS (7) stuck on well over 1400m fresh and remains at the same trip today with a good draw on offer. He drops in weight today though and has shown he's better than the grade he races in here. Fitter again now and can get back to something like his best. TON OF GRUNT (3) flew home to win a CL3 at this trip at Belmont last time out and clocked some strong splits in the process. The inside draw today can see him sit a touch closer and the form out of his latest effort has already been franked. Can repeat the dose without surprising. GLANCED (8) is third-up now and is on the cusp of another win. Bumped into a smart one last start at Belmont and she remains down in the weights. Can go one better. MOONWALK (9) can improve coming back in distance today. RANDOM REWARDS (11) was too good from the back last start as a 40-1 pop and can feature again.
